candidate_decisions: Keep budget guidance in the instructions file so the model has deterministic values for required tool arguments.

candidate_lessons: When an LLM tool schema has required numeric fields, mirror those fields explicitly in the corresponding instructions to avoid hallucinated defaults or validation failures.
